item.title: Deadly mushrooms spreading across backyards as weather cools down
item.description: ‘It potentially can cause death if ingested.’

item.title: FutureBall: Double the luck for Aussie punters with launch of ‘most winnable lottery’
item.description: Aussies will be celebrating the launch of a new Lotto game that promises a fresh twist and better odds of bagging a life-changing win.

item.title: Japan earthquake: Tsunami warning issued after 7.7-magnitude shock off northeast coast
item.description: Tsunami warnings are in place and authorities have urged people to seek higher ground.

item.title: Home truths: Where in NSW it is possible to buy a property under $700,000
item.description: It is no secret Sydney is the most expensive city in the country to buy a home. These are the top areas for first homebuyers.

item.title: Baby food products in supermarkets failing global nutritional guidelines
item.description: ‘This is literally dessert in a pouch’.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: US President Donald Trump announces 10-day Lebanon ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah with six-point plan
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Shooting at Teotihuacan Pyramids in Mexico kills Canadian tourist and leaves six injured
item.description: Dozens of shots were reportedly fired as people ran for their lives.

item.title: Cash making a comeback as Aussies turn to notes and coins for range of transactions
item.description: How often Aussies use physical currency might surprise you.

item.title: Electoral Commission of South Australia braced for damning independent review
item.description: The watchdog is under pressure after missing votes, tech failures and booths opening late.

item.title: Man dies after e-bike crash with bus in Perth as legislation change touted across Australia
item.description: The tragedy occurred weeks after the WA government called for ‘urgent national reform’ on e-bikes.

item.title: IGA trials ‘Community Check-In’ lane in Sydney to bring back human interaction at the register
item.description: ‘We noticed many shoppers were actively choosing the staffed checkouts.’

item.title: Fresh details emerge after veteran shot dead eight children in Louisiana
item.description: Police have aired what they believe sparked the tragedy.

item.title: I wrote about being rejected from Meghan Markle’s Sydney retreat. The internet response was exactly what you’d expect
item.description: The online response reveals just how quickly ‘empowerment’ can turn into something else.

item.title: Electoral Commission of South Australia confirms more ballots from Enfield and Narungga discovered
item.description: The commission says the ‘operational’ issues have not affected the integrity of the state election.

item.title: Racing in mourning after death of Bart Cummings-trained champion Precedence, aged 20
item.description: ‘This is awful news.’

item.title: The Osmonds star Alan Osmond dies aged 76 after battle with multiple sclerosis
item.description: ‘His positive outlook was an inspiration to many.’

item.title: Geelong small forward Tyson Stengle’s AFL future in serious doubt
item.description: A medical model is preventing him from playing and he ‘simply isn’t talking to people closest to him’.

item.title: AFL’s Opening Round concept to be permanently scrapped and replaced by ‘Hallelujah Round 1’
item.description: Industry heavyweights have all privately admitted the same thing.

item.title: Australian cash usage on the rise, RBA survey shows ahead of Cash Out Day
item.description: Physical currency was supposed to be on the way out but a new survey tells a different story.

item.title: Michael movie review: Even divorced from his complicated legacy, the Michael Jackson biopic is unwatchable
item.description: Even divorced from the late singer’s complicated legacy, this listless slog is not worthy of yours or anyone’s time.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Australia secures another four cargo ships worth of diesel, Anthony Albanese and Chris Bowen announce
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: E-scooter hire ditched in Hobart over safety and behavioural concerns
item.description: The hire service has been banned after more than 37 deaths nationwide already this decade.

item.title: Traffic fines issued by an AI-camera dismissed in WA
item.description: More than $1 million in fines were wiped out due to the AI-powered camera.

item.title: Moana Pasifika ‘tragedy’ inspires ex-Wallabies captain to consider NRL defection with PNG Chiefs
item.description: The 110-Test great is plotting a move ‘home’ for a cause close to his heart.

item.title: Health Minister Mark Butler reveals NDIS overhaul and how federal government will rein in growth
item.description: Mark Butler will target the scheme’s out-of-control growth while admitting Australians need ‘more ID to get into a licensed club than to be an NDIS provider’.

item.title: Bali: Mum issues dire warning after henna tattoo on popular Balinese beach leaves daughter scarred
item.description: ‘We talked about avoiding other things but clearly I should have added this to the list!’

item.title: Deadloch and Offspring actress Alicia Gardiner accused of ‘breaking the girl code’ in alleged assault
item.description: The actor has fronted a Melbourne court, charged over grabbing a security guard in a compromising spot.

item.title: Denise Richards and daughter Lola Sheen lead fresh tributes to Patrick Muldoon after ‘sudden’ death
item.description: Patrick Muldoon’s family said he was ‘suddenly taken from this Earth’ aged 57.

item.title: NBA superstar Victor Wembanyama suffers concussion in San Antonio’s shock playoffs loss to Portland
item.description: Victor Wembanyama laid on the floor for around 30 seconds before attempting to stagger to his feet.

item.title: Court documents reveal fiery clash between Kyle Sandilands and Jackie O Henderson months before split
item.description: ‘You want to know the truth, here’s the truth.’

item.title: Billionaire Adrian Portelli to sell petrol at service station for just $1 a litre in Preston, Melbourne
item.description: But there's a major catch before drivers head to top up at the bowser.

item.title: Melbourne researchers develop world-first plastic that kills viruses on contact
item.description: The plastic could protect everything from mobile phones to hospital surfaces.

item.title: Australia's biggest apartment developer Meriton boycotts Sydney for Queensland over planning approval times
item.description: The shift has raised alarm bells about the city’s housing future.

item.title: Family of teen girl found dead in trunk of singer D4vd’s Tesla says ‘all we want is justice’
item.description: They remembered their daughter as ‘a beautiful, strong girl who loved to sing and dance.’

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.description: The popular presenter revealed his shock diagnosis in 2024.

item.description: ‘We’ve got to prepare for the possibility that this will get worse before it gets better.’

item.description: The NSW premier has labelled the extra day off a ‘common sense change’ as other leaders face pressure to follow suit.

item.title: Oscar Piastri weighs in on F1 rival Max Verstappen’s situation: ‘Not a great look’
item.description: The Aussie says it will be a ‘big loss’ if the champion walks away from the sport.

item.title: Teen charged with killing Florida stepsister on cruise ship pleads not guilty
item.description: The 16-year-old is accused of murder and aggravated sexual assault.

item.title: Comedian Russell Brand admits sleeping with 16-year-old when he was 30
item.description: The British comedian said his fame led to him to acts that were ‘wrong’.

item.description: The set of seven medals were found in an op shop decades after they vanished.

item.description: The shake-up could be rolled out in hospitals, hotels, stadiums and shopping centres from next year.

item.description: There is ongoing concern about their influence on Australians’ financial decision making.

item.title: John Mountain: Perth chef who clashed with Tash Peterson apologises after ‘stupid’ gang rape joke sparks fury
item.description: A popular chef and restaurant owner in Perth’s northern suburbs is under fire after using the term ‘gang rape’ in a social media post to describe a busy night at the venue.

item.description: The swimming great is thrilled she’ll no longer be the ‘worst looking person’ at the pool.

item.description: ‘She was just a beautiful, ambitious, kind, and trusting girl.’

item.description: ‘Just because you watch us on television doesn’t mean you know us.’

item.description: The four-year-old boy born with a rare genetic condition couldn't walk just months ago.

item.description: More than 2000 sets that were collected over more than four decades are up for grabs.

item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Victorian motorists to pocket 20 per cent rebate on car registration to ease pain at the pump
item.description: Drivers in one state will receive the rebate to ease cost-of-living pressure as fuel prices soar across the country.

item.title: Freelander 8 revealed: Chery-JLR brand confirms global SUV launch with Australian testing
item.description: After a 25-year hiatus, the Freelander brand has returned with a new global SUV lineup, and Australian roads are already being used to dial it in.

item.title: The Chinese cars from non-Chinese brands that we're most excited for
item.description: New Chinese cars are coming to Australia not just via Chinese brands like BYD, Chery and GWM, but also through much more familiar and established brands.

item.title: Trump pulls plug on last-minute Pakistan peace talks with Iran, claims US ‘has all the cards’
item.description: The cancellation marks another setback for efforts to secure a ceasefire, with conflicting signals continuing from both sides.

item.title: Toyota HiLux vs Mitsubishi Triton: Australia’s last manual utes
item.description: The Toyota HiLux and Mitsubishi Triton are duking it out for the title of the last manual-transmission utes available in Australia.

item.title: BYD Atto 3: Next-generation electric SUV revealed in China
item.description: A new BYD Atto 3 has been launched in China with a longer, sharper body, and support for the company's flash charging system.
